violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage * was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. . Refrigerator used for drinks and sandwiches was at 42.8*F. Monitor and ensure temperature stays below 41*F.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food * was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. - Taco meat in the refrigerator had a date of 15 SEP 2025. the use by on this date would have been 25 SEP 2025.
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
